definitions.name: los_days
definitions.business_description: The number of days between Hospital admission date and time and Hospital discharge date and time
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: total_cost
definitions.business_description: Date difference calculation using Estimated cost per patient day for the department (CLARITY_DEP.COST_PER_DAY), DAY, Hospital admission date and time (PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_ADMSN_TIME), Hospital discharge date and time (PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME)
definitions.source: CLARITY_DEP (Department reference table), PAT_ENC_HSP (Hospital patient encounters (inpatient, ED, observation))
conditions: Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.HOSP_DISCH_TIME
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Hospital discharge date and time is not null

definitions.name: filter:where:PAT_ENC_HSP.ADT_PAT_CLASS_C
definitions.business_description: Filter: only include records where Patient class (1=Inpatient, 2=Outpatient, 3=Emergency, 4=Observation) is Inpatient
